caption: 又坐过了一站。
scene: Andy slumped asleep on a metro bench seat, head tilted to one side, a tiny speech bubble with Z, one hand loosely holding a phone, a simple horizontal window line behind him suggesting a subway car
bible_hook: §3 Andy always falls asleep one stop past their stop on the orange line
rationale: Anchors to a recurring commute gag never drawn yet; solo Andy after recent 'both' posts, and avoids snack/AirPod/outfit motifs already used this month.
